description: Surveyed papers with relevance to TRELLIS.2 quality improvement. Updated 2026-02-22 with mesh integrity, texture quality, and commercial standards survey.

papers.title: Structured 3D Latents for Scalable and Versatile 3D Generation
papers.key_contribution: SLAT representation: sparse voxel latents decoded to mesh/3DGS/NeRF; flow matching on sparse transformers
papers.relevance_to_trellis2: This IS TRELLIS.2 itself. Defines the architecture we optimize.

papers.title: PBR-SR: Zero-shot PBR Texture Super-Resolution via 2D Priors
papers.key_contribution: Zero-shot PBR texture SR using differentiable rendering + 2D diffusion priors; no training needed
papers.relevance_to_trellis2: Direct post-processing improvement: enhance TRELLIS.2 output textures from 2K to 4K+ with perceptual quality

papers.title: Elevate3D: High-Frequency Detail Enhancement via Diffusion SDEdit
papers.key_contribution: HFS-SDEdit: diffusion generates low-freq freely, constrains high-freq from input. Texture refinement.
papers.relevance_to_trellis2: Can refine TRELLIS.2 coarse textures by injecting high-frequency detail from input image

papers.title: 3DEnhancer: Consistent Multi-View Diffusion for 3D Enhancement
papers.key_contribution: Multi-view consistent texture enhancement via diffusion; render-refine-reproject loop
papers.relevance_to_trellis2: Post-generation texture quality boost; applicable to any mesh output

papers.title: SuperCarver: Normal Map Diffusion + Noise-Resistant Distance Field Deformation
papers.key_contribution: Uses normal map diffusion to add geometric detail; noise-resistant SDF deformation
papers.relevance_to_trellis2: Can add micro-geometry detail lost in mesh simplification (500K→ target faces)

papers.title: SyncTweedies: A General Generative Framework Based on Synchronized Diffusions
papers.key_contribution: x_0 prediction synchronization for multi-view consistency
papers.relevance_to_trellis2: Proven equivalent to velocity averaging in flow matching (no benefit). OBSOLETE for this architecture.

papers.title: Hunyuan3D 2.1: 3D-Aware RoPE for UV Seam Reduction
papers.key_contribution: 3D-Aware RoPE embeddings reduce UV seam artifacts; illumination-invariant PBR training
papers.relevance_to_trellis2: UV seam reduction technique applicable to postprocess; RoPE already used in TRELLIS.2

papers.title: 3D-Consistent Noise for SDS-based Texture Refinement
papers.key_contribution: 3D-consistent noise field for score distillation; best post-hoc texture refinement approach
papers.relevance_to_trellis2: Can replace random noise with 3D-consistent noise in texture stage for better coherence

papers.title: Depth Anything V3: Metric Depth Estimation
papers.key_contribution: Apache 2.0 metric depth estimation; can provide depth prior for sparse structure stage
papers.relevance_to_trellis2: Could improve Stage 1 occupancy prediction by providing depth prior from input image

papers.title: GPT-4V(ision) is a Human-Aligned Evaluator for Text-to-3D Generation
papers.key_contribution: Uses GPT-4V for automatic 3D quality evaluation across 5 criteria with ELO ratings; achieves 0.710 Kendall tau correlation with human judgments
papers.relevance_to_trellis2: Defines the 5-criteria framework (alignment, 3D plausibility, texture detail, geometry detail, tex-geom coherency) that could replace our hand-crafted evaluator

papers.title: 3DGen-Bench: Comprehensive Benchmark Suite for 3D Generative Models
papers.key_contribution: First comprehensive multi-dimension human preference dataset for 3D: 68K expert votes, 56K absolute scores, 11K models; introduces 3DGen-Score and 3DGen-Eval automated evaluators
papers.relevance_to_trellis2: Provides 5 evaluation dimensions (geom plausibility, geom details, texture quality, geom-tex coherence, prompt alignment) and trained automated evaluators that could enhance our scoring

papers.title: MEt3R: Measuring Multi-View Consistency in Generated Images
papers.key_contribution: Pose-free, content-independent multi-view consistency metric using DUSt3R reconstruction + DINO/FeatUp feature comparison
papers.relevance_to_trellis2: Could evaluate multi-view consistency of TRELLIS.2 renders without camera poses; directly measures 3D coherence

papers.title: DreamSim: Learning New Dimensions of Human Visual Similarity using Synthetic Data
papers.key_contribution: Perceptual similarity metric bridging LPIPS (low-level) and CLIP (high-level); trained on 20K human-judged synthetic triplets; better human alignment than LPIPS alone
papers.relevance_to_trellis2: Could replace/supplement LPIPS in our evaluator for more human-aligned perceptual scoring; pip-installable

papers.title: SRAM: Shape-Realism Alignment Metric for No Reference 3D Shape Evaluation
papers.key_contribution: No-reference shape realism evaluation via Point-BERT encoder + PointLLM bridge + MLP realism decoder; PLCC=0.689, SROCC=0.696 on RealismGrading dataset
papers.relevance_to_trellis2: Could evaluate TRELLIS.2 output realism without ground truth 3D, exactly matching our optimization scenario

papers.title: Textured Geometry Evaluation: Perceptual 3D Textured Shape Metric via 3D Latent-Geometry Network
papers.key_contribution: Render-free perceptual metric for textured meshes using PointNet++ with Latent-Geometry Set Abstraction; jointly evaluates geometry and color
papers.relevance_to_trellis2: Could provide render-independent quality signal for TRELLIS.2 meshes; operates directly on 3D data

papers.title: Benchmarking and Learning Multi-Dimensional Quality Evaluator for Text-to-3D Generation
papers.key_contribution: HyperScore: CLIP-based multi-dimensional quality evaluator with Conditional Feature Fusion and Adaptive Quality Mapping; MATE-3D benchmark with 107K annotations
papers.relevance_to_trellis2: Provides a trained multi-dimensional quality predictor (alignment, geometry, texture, overall) that could automate our evaluation

papers.title: 3D Arena: An Open Platform for Generative 3D Evaluation
papers.key_contribution: Open platform with 123K votes from 8K users across 19 SOTA models; ELO-based ranking; textured models +144 ELO vs untextured
papers.relevance_to_trellis2: Contextualizes TRELLIS.2 quality relative to competitors; reveals that texture is worth +144 ELO in human preference

papers.title: Textured Mesh Quality Assessment: Large-scale Dataset and Deep Learning-based Quality Metric
papers.key_contribution: 343K distorted stimuli from 55 source models; 148K quality judgments from 4500 participants; learned quality metric for textured meshes
papers.relevance_to_trellis2: Largest textured mesh quality dataset; the learned metric could detect distortion artifacts in TRELLIS.2 outputs

papers.title: T3Bench: Benchmarking Current Progress in Text-to-3D Generation
papers.key_contribution: 300 prompts at 3 complexity levels; automatic quality + alignment metrics with >0.75 Spearman correlation to human ratings
papers.relevance_to_trellis2: Established benchmark for text-to-3D; quality metric uses multi-view scoring + regional convolution

papers.title: Towards Fine-Grained Text-to-3D Quality Assessment: A Benchmark and A Two-Stage Rank-Learning Metric
papers.key_contribution: T23D-CompBench: 3600 meshes from 10 SOTA models with 129K human ratings; Rank2Score: pairwise ranking + contrastive regression + curriculum learning
papers.relevance_to_trellis2: Most fine-grained quality assessment framework to date; could provide nuanced quality signals for optimization

papers.title: Meta 3D AssetGen: Text-to-Mesh Generation with High-Quality Geometry, Texture, and PBR Materials
papers.key_contribution: Text-to-mesh with PBR materials; evaluates with PSNR, LPIPS, Depth L1, Sil-IoU, CD, NC; 72% human preference over competitors
papers.relevance_to_trellis2: Key competitor; their evaluation methodology (6 quantitative metrics + user study) is a good reference for our evaluator

papers.title: Rethinking FID: Towards a Better Evaluation Metric for Image Generation
papers.key_contribution: Analysis of FID limitations; proposes CMMD (CLIP Maximum Mean Discrepancy) as more robust alternative
papers.relevance_to_trellis2: Informs choice of distributional metrics; CMMD may be better than FID/KID for 3D generation evaluation

papers.title: TRELLIS.2: Native and Compact Structured Latents for 3D Generation
papers.key_contribution: O-Voxel representation, FDG mesh extraction, PBR attributes; evaluates with MD, F-score, PSNR, LPIPS, PBR PSNR/LPIPS, user study (66.5% preference)
papers.relevance_to_trellis2: This IS TRELLIS.2 (the version we run). Defines the evaluation methodology we should match.

papers.title: Boosting 3D Object Generation through PBR Materials
papers.key_contribution: Converts RGB textures to PBR via fine-tuned diffusion; boosts CRM, InstantMesh, Wonder3D, TripoSR with relightable materials
papers.relevance_to_trellis2: Could boost TRELLIS.2 PBR quality if native PBR is insufficient; demonstrates relighting evaluation methodology

papers.title: An Evaluation Metric for Single Image-to-3D Models Based on Object Detection Perspective
papers.key_contribution: No-reference metric comparing object detection results between input image and novel-view renders; works with just one input image
papers.relevance_to_trellis2: Directly applicable to image-to-3D evaluation without ground truth; novel approach for our evaluator

papers.title: Improving Classifier-Free Guidance of Flow Matching via Manifold Projection
papers.key_contribution: Manifold projection step via incremental gradient descent during sampling. Anderson Acceleration. Constrains trajectory to data manifold.
papers.relevance_to_trellis2: Different mechanism from CFG-Zero*/APG. Addresses off-manifold drift. NOT YET TESTED on TRELLIS.2.

papers.title: Rectified-CFG++ for Flow Based Models
papers.key_contribution: Adaptive predictor-corrector guidance for rectified flow. Bounded trajectory in data manifold.
papers.relevance_to_trellis2: Applicable to FlowEuler sampler. More robust than single-step Euler at high guidance scales.

papers.title: Material Anything: Generating Materials for Any 3D Object via Diffusion
papers.key_contribution: Feed-forward PBR generation with triple-head architecture, confidence masks, UV-space refiner.
papers.relevance_to_trellis2: PBR refinement post-processor for TRELLIS.2 outputs.

papers.title: MVPaint: Synchronized Multi-View Diffusion for Painting Anything 3D
papers.key_contribution: SMG + S3I + UVR module (UV super-resolution + seam-smoothing).
papers.relevance_to_trellis2: UVR module applicable as post-processing for UV-space enhancement.

papers.title: DetailGen3D: Generative 3D Geometry Enhancement via Data-Dependent Flow
papers.key_contribution: Data-dependent flow for coarse-to-fine geometry. Token matching. DINO conditioning. Seconds-level inference.
papers.relevance_to_trellis2: Direct geometry post-processor. DINO feature compatible with TRELLIS.2.

papers.title: Unique3D: High-Quality and Efficient 3D Mesh Generation from a Single Image
papers.key_contribution: Multi-view + normal map dual diffusion, ISOMER mesh deformation, multi-level upscaling.
papers.relevance_to_trellis2: Normal diffusion + mesh deformation for geometry post-processing.

papers.title: MeshFormer: High-Quality Mesh Generation with 3D-Guided Reconstruction Model
papers.key_contribution: 3D sparse voxels + SDF + surface rendering. Hybrid conv-attention.
papers.relevance_to_trellis2: Architectural inspiration: hybrid conv-attention in sparse voxels.

papers.title: MeshAnything V2: Artist-Created Mesh Generation With Adjacent Mesh Tokenization
papers.key_contribution: Autoregressive mesh topology. AMT halves token count. Up to 1600 faces.
papers.relevance_to_trellis2: Retopology post-processor for cleaner mesh topology.

papers.title: CraftsMan3D: High-fidelity Mesh Generation with 3D Native Diffusion and Interactive Geometry Refiner
papers.key_contribution: 3D-native DiT + normal-based per-vertex displacement refiner.
papers.relevance_to_trellis2: Geometry refiner component applicable as post-processor.

papers.title: MS3D: High-Quality 3D Generation via Multi-Scale Representation Modeling
papers.key_contribution: Progressive multi-scale sparse voxel generation. Hierarchical latent aggregation for SDF.
papers.relevance_to_trellis2: Most architecturally relevant improvement. Progressive refinement for TRELLIS.2.

papers.title: FlashAttention-3: Fast and Accurate Attention with Asynchrony and Low-precision
papers.key_contribution: Async + FP8 attention for Hopper. 1.5-2x speedup.
papers.relevance_to_trellis2: Speed enables more steps or higher resolution. Need SM 12.1 compatibility check.

papers.title: GaussianAnything: Interactive Point Cloud Latent Diffusion for 3D Generation
papers.key_contribution: Cascaded 3D diffusion with shape-texture disentanglement. Multi-modal conditioning.
papers.relevance_to_trellis2: Disentanglement concept applicable to TRELLIS.2 SLAT design.

papers.title: DiffBIR: Towards Blind Image Restoration with Generative Diffusion Prior
papers.key_contribution: Two-stage blind restoration: degradation removal + latent diffusion texture generation.
papers.relevance_to_trellis2: 2D prior for render-enhance-reproject texture enhancement. Backbone of PBR-SR.

papers.title: 3DTopia-XL: Scaling High-quality 3D Asset Generation via Primitive Diffusion
papers.key_contribution: PrimX tensorial PBR encoding + DiT-based primitive diffusion.
papers.relevance_to_trellis2: Alternative PBR representation. Architectural inspiration.

papers.title: TexPainter: Generative Mesh Texturing with Multi-view Consistency
papers.key_contribution: DDIM optimization + visibility/orientation-weighted multi-view blending.
papers.relevance_to_trellis2: Multi-view texture consistency optimization technique.

papers.title: Improved Noise Schedule for Diffusion Training
papers.key_contribution: Noise schedule as probability distribution design. Logit-normal concentrates steps at critical region.
papers.relevance_to_trellis2: Training-free inference-time non-uniform timestep spacing.

papers.title: Target-Balanced Score Distillation
papers.key_contribution: SDS as multi-objective optimization with adaptive balancing.
papers.relevance_to_trellis2: Applicable to SDS-based texture refinement post-generation.

papers.title: Geometry-Aware Score Distillation via 3D Consistent Noising and Gradient Consistency Modeling
papers.key_contribution: 3D-consistent noise via 3DGS + geometry-based gradient warping + gradient consistency loss.
papers.relevance_to_trellis2: Plug-and-play SDS improvement for texture refinement loops.

papers.title: PartUV: Part-Based UV Unwrapping of 3D Meshes
papers.key_contribution: Part-aligned UV charts reducing fragmentation vs xatlas.
papers.relevance_to_trellis2: Drop-in xatlas replacement. Fewer UV islands = less color bleeding.

papers.title: ArtUV: Artist-style UV Unwrapping
papers.key_contribution: Outperforms xatlas in distortion, runtime, and UV island count.
papers.relevance_to_trellis2: Better UV unwrapper alternative.

papers.title: MaterialMVP: Illumination-Invariant Material Generation via Multi-view PBR Diffusion
papers.key_contribution: Illumination-invariant PBR material generation via multi-view diffusion.
papers.relevance_to_trellis2: PBR material quality. Illumination invariance reduces baked lighting artifacts.

papers.title: GTR: Improving Large 3D Reconstruction Models through Geometry and Texture Refinement
papers.key_contribution: Per-instance triplane fine-tuning + NeRF color refinement. 4 seconds.
papers.relevance_to_trellis2: Fast per-instance refinement concept.

papers.title: InstantMesh: Efficient 3D Mesh Generation from a Single Image
papers.key_contribution: MV diffusion + LRM-based reconstruction with differentiable iso-surface extraction.
papers.relevance_to_trellis2: Differentiable iso-surface extraction for mesh stage.

papers.title: Direct3D: Scalable Image-to-3D Generation via 3D Latent Diffusion Transformer
papers.key_contribution: D3D-VAE + D3D-DiT for native 3D generation. Triplane latent space.
papers.relevance_to_trellis2: Alternative latent 3D generation approach.

papers.title: Perceptual Crack Detection for Rendered 3D Textured Meshes
papers.key_contribution: Contrast and Laplacian-based crack artifact detection in rendered meshes; generates crack maps for quality assessment weighting
papers.relevance_to_trellis2: Directly addresses surface peeling/fragmentation detection -- one of our 5 critical undetected defects

papers.title: Robust Hole-Detection in Triangular Meshes Irrespective of the Presence of Singular Vertices
papers.key_contribution: Boundary traversal for hole detection handling singular vertices; robust boundary loop counting
papers.relevance_to_trellis2: Provides robust hole detection for TRELLIS.2 meshes, replacing simple watertight binary check

papers.title: HybridMQA: Exploring Geometry-Texture Interactions for Colored Mesh Quality Assessment
papers.key_contribution: Graph learning + 2D projection with cross-attention for joint geometry-texture quality; first hybrid full-reference colored mesh QA
papers.relevance_to_trellis2: Shows that joint geometry-texture analysis outperforms individual analysis; relevant for detecting peeling where texture diverges from geometry

papers.title: SeamCrafter: Enhancing Mesh Seam Generation for Artist UV Unwrapping via Reinforcement Learning
papers.key_contribution: RL-based UV seam placement with seam-evaluation framework assessing distortion and fragmentation; DPO for seam quality
papers.relevance_to_trellis2: Seam evaluation framework applicable to measuring UV seam quality in TRELLIS.2 outputs; xatlas replacement candidate

papers.title: ArtUV: Unsupervised Representation Learning for 3D Mesh Parameterization with Semantic and Visibility Objectives
papers.key_contribution: Visibility-aware UV unwrapping using ambient occlusion as exposure proxy; steers seams toward occluded regions
papers.relevance_to_trellis2: Visibility-aware UV would reduce seam visibility on TRELLIS.2 outputs; differentiable AO objective

papers.title: Textured Mesh Quality Assessment Using Geometry and Color Field Similarity
papers.key_contribution: SDF + color field based quality metric with 4 perception features: geometry similarity, geometry gradient, color distribution, color gradient
papers.relevance_to_trellis2: Principled approach to textured mesh quality; the color field similarity could detect bleeding and desaturation

papers.title: GeodesicPSIM: Predicting the Quality of Static Mesh with Texture Map via Geodesic Patch Similarity
papers.key_contribution: Geodesic distance-based patch extraction for mesh+texture quality; more accurate than Euclidean for curved surfaces
papers.relevance_to_trellis2: Novel mesh-native quality measurement that respects surface topology

papers.title: A Roughness Measure for 3D Mesh Visual Masking
papers.key_contribution: Gaussian curvature-based local roughness LRGC for mesh visual quality masking; surface-integral weighted roughness metric
papers.relevance_to_trellis2: Directly applicable to measuring surface roughness on TRELLIS.2 outputs; detects the 'orange peel' effect on smooth manufactured objects

papers.title: A fast roughness-based approach to the assessment of 3D mesh visual quality
papers.key_contribution: Fast Mesh Perceptual Distance using global roughness values from dihedral angles and geometric Laplacian variance; multi-scale roughness comparison
papers.relevance_to_trellis2: Efficient roughness computation using dihedral angles -- directly available from trimesh face_adjacency_angles

papers.title: Advancing 3D Generation Evaluation with Hierarchical Validity
papers.key_contribution: Hierarchical 3D evaluation: object(5d), part(2d), material(4d); InternVideo2.5 + PartField; M2AP annotation pipeline; tau=0.774
papers.relevance_to_trellis2: Current SOTA automated evaluator; material-level dimensions (details, colorfulness, consistency, plausibility) directly relevant to our defects
